mapper.insert: INSERT INTO statistics (af_id, gm_id, sta_aqi, sta_pm25, sta_pm10, sta_so2, sta_no2, sta_co, sta_o3, sta_date, sta_time, sta_remark) VALUES (#{afId}, #{gmId}, #{staAqi}, #{staPm25}, #{staPm10}, #{staSo2}, #{staNo2}, #{staCo}, #{staO3}, #{staDate}, #{staTime}, #{staRemark})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM statistics
AND gm_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT af.province AS provinceName, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN af.af_aqi > 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS exceedCount FROM aqi_feedback af WHERE af.af_state = 2 GROUP BY af.province ORDER BY exceedCount DESC
SELECT s.sta_aqi AS aqiLevel, a.aqi_name AS aqiName, COUNT(*) AS count FROM statistics s LEFT JOIN aqi a ON s.sta_aqi = a.aqi_id GROUP BY s.sta_aqi, a.aqi_name ORDER BY s.sta_aqi

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(sta_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM statistics WHERE sta_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH), '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(sta_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM statistics WHERE sta_aqi <= 2
